brief_notes: Comprehensive, well-structured manuscript with full IMRaD sections (Intro, Related Work, Methods, Results, Discussion), explicit limitations, and two tables. All key numbers verified against extraction: 30-40 bp precision, n=14 TRF, n=7 flow-FISH, R2=0.84, 40 bp/day TERT attrition, 1000 bp elongation in 3 days, 24 bp/year aging, AUCs (0.98/0.93/0.91) with accuracies (95/91/86%), 75% CRC, 20 patients, TINF2 p.Gln298fs, TRF overestimate 1000-3000 bp, flow-FISH 1500 bp. Five figures (schematic, TERT attrition, aging slopes, classifier ROC, CRC) are included and referenced properly. Prose is unified, transitions are strong, and the discussion engages with biological mechanism and limitations. Citations are abundant and stylistically appropriate. Minor: figure numbering doesn't match file labels (e.g., fig3_schematic used as first figure).
